value.found_quote: Role-based access control (RBAC) lets you decide who can do what across your organization and projects—both through the API and in the Dashboard.
value.rationale: The page explicitly documents OpenAI's RBAC offering, confirming that it allows administrators to control who can perform what actions across the organization and projects. The page also lists network-level access control features such as "IP allowlist" (View and manage IP allowlist) and "mTLS" (View and manage mutual TLS settings) as permissions within the RBAC framework, substantiating the network-level access controls aspect of the claim. The offering is presented as currently active with detailed setup instructions, best practices, and a full permissions table.
